product_overview: EDOS is a multi-tenant SaaS point-of-sale platform for East African businesses that combines sales checkout, inventory, customer and supplier management, reporting, billing, and regulatory compliance in one system. It supports tenant-based operations, M-Pesa payments, and KRA eTIMS workflows for businesses such as retail shops, supermarkets, pharmacies, restaurants, wholesalers, and service businesses.
core_goals: Process sales quickly at the point of sale
Manage products, stock levels, and inventory adjustments
Track customers, suppliers, and business expenses
Generate sales, revenue, and product performance reports
Support subscription billing and tenant administration
Handle M-Pesa payments for sales and subscriptions
Submit invoices for KRA eTIMS compliance
Provide centralized super admin oversight across tenants

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows tenant and admin users to authenticate with email and password.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit sign in form -> See tenant dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit sign in form -> See an error message

features.name: Tenant Registration
features.description: Allows a new business to register a tenant account with business details and a subscription plan.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Enter business name, subdomain, owner email, and password -> Select a subscription plan -> Submit registration form -> See confirmation that email verification has been sent

features.name: POS Terminal
features.description: Provides a checkout terminal for building carts, assigning customers, taking payments, and producing receipts.
user_flows: Navigate to /tenant -> Search and add products to cart -> Adjust item quantities -> Apply a discount -> Search and assign a customer -> Select payment method -> Complete payment -> See receipt confirmation
Navigate to /tenant -> Search and add products to cart -> Hold the current sale -> Open held sales -> Resume the held sale -> Complete payment

Navigate to /tenant -> Search and add products to cart -> Select M-Pesa as the payment method -> Enter the customer phone number -> Send STK Push -> Wait for the payment prompt on the customer phone -> Confirm payment -> See receipt confirmation

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Lets users manage product records, stock levels, categories, and inventory adjustments.
user_flows: Navigate to /tenant/inventory -> Search products by name or SKU -> Filter by category or stock status -> Add a new product -> Enter product details -> Save the product -> See it appear in the inventory list
Navigate to /tenant/inventory -> Open a product for editing -> Update product details -> Save changes -> See the updated product information
Navigate to /tenant/inventory -> Select a product for stock adjustment -> Choose an adjustment type -> Enter quantity and reason -> Save the adjustment -> See the stock level updated
Navigate to /tenant/inventory -> Export the inventory list -> Download the data file

features.name: Inventory Intelligence
features.description: Shows demand forecasting insights, reorder suggestions, slow movers, and stock health metrics.
user_flows: Navigate to /tenant/inventory/intelligence -> View demand forecast charts -> Review recommended reorder quantities -> Inspect slow-moving products -> Check the stock health score

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Allows users to create, update, search, and review customer records and purchase history.
user_flows: Navigate to /tenant/customers -> Search customers by name or phone -> Open a customer record -> View purchase history and total spend
Navigate to /tenant/customers -> Add a new customer -> Enter contact details -> Save the customer -> See the customer listed in the directory
Navigate to /tenant/customers -> Open an existing customer record -> Edit contact details -> Save changes -> See the updated customer information
Navigate to /tenant/customers -> Export the customer list -> Download the data file

features.name: Supplier Management
features.description: Lets users maintain supplier contact records.
user_flows: Navigate to /tenant/suppliers -> View the supplier list -> Add a new supplier -> Enter name, email, phone, and address -> Save the supplier -> See the supplier listed
Navigate to /tenant/suppliers -> Open an existing supplier -> Edit supplier details -> Save changes -> See the updated supplier information
Navigate to /tenant/suppliers -> Remove a supplier -> See the supplier disappear from the list

features.name: Expense Tracking
features.description: Lets users record, update, filter, delete, and export business expenses.
user_flows: Navigate to /tenant/expenses -> View expenses with date filters -> Add a new expense -> Enter category, amount, and description -> Save the expense -> See it listed
Navigate to /tenant/expenses -> Open an expense entry -> Edit the expense details -> Save changes -> See the updated expense
Navigate to /tenant/expenses -> Remove an expense -> See it removed from the list
Navigate to /tenant/expenses -> Export the expense report -> Download the report file

features.name: Procurement (Purchase Orders)
features.description: Supports creating purchase orders, tracking their status, and emailing orders to suppliers.
user_flows: Navigate to /tenant/procurement -> View the purchase orders list -> Create a new purchase order -> Select a supplier -> Add products and quantities -> Set an expected delivery date -> Save the purchase order -> See it listed as pending
Navigate to /tenant/procurement -> Open a purchase order -> Send the purchase order via email -> See confirmation that the order was sent
Navigate to /tenant/procurement -> Open a purchase order -> Update the order status -> See the new status reflected in the list

features.name: Sales History
features.description: Provides access to completed sales, receipt details, filtering, and export.
user_flows: Navigate to /tenant/sales -> View the sales list -> Filter by date range -> Search by receipt number or customer -> Open a sale -> View sale details and receipt
Navigate to /tenant/sales -> Export the sales data -> Download the data file

features.name: Reports
features.description: Displays business performance reports for revenue, products, payments, and tax.
user_flows: Navigate to /tenant/reports -> Select a date range -> View revenue summary and trend charts -> Review top-selling products -> Review payment method breakdown -> Review tax summary
Navigate to /tenant/reports -> Select a date range -> Export the report -> Download the report file

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Provides a business overview with revenue metrics, trends, alerts, and recent activity.
user_flows: Navigate to /tenant/dashboard -> View today, week, and month revenue -> Review the 7-day trend chart -> Check low stock alerts -> Review recent sales -> Inspect top products by quantity sold

features.name: eTIMS KRA Compliance
features.description: Lets users configure eTIMS settings and submit invoices for KRA compliance.
user_flows: Navigate to /tenant/etims/settings -> Configure device serial, business PIN, and branch details -> Save the settings -> See the updated configuration
Navigate to /tenant/etims -> View pending invoices -> Submit an invoice to KRA -> See the submission status and eTIMS invoice number
Navigate to /tenant/etims -> View a failed submission -> Retry the submission -> See the updated status

features.name: Billing & Subscription
features.description: Allows tenants to review billing status and pay for subscription plans.
user_flows: Navigate to /tenant/settings -> View the current plan and billing status -> Choose an upgrade path -> Complete Stripe checkout -> Return to the app after payment
Navigate to /tenant/settings -> View the current plan and billing status -> Choose to pay by M-Pesa -> Enter the phone number -> Send STK Push -> Confirm payment on the phone -> See billing update

features.name: Staff Management
features.description: Allows tenant owners and managers to invite staff members and assign roles.
user_flows: Navigate to /tenant/settings -> View the staff list -> Invite a new staff member by email -> Assign a role -> Send the invitation -> See the staff member added to the list
Navigate to /tenant/settings -> Open a staff member record -> Remove the staff member -> See the staff member removed from the list

features.name: Admin Tenant Management
features.description: Gives super admins a centralized view of tenants with status and plan controls.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/tenants -> Search and filter tenants -> Open a tenant detail view -> Review plan, status, billing, and usage
Navigate to /admin/tenants -> Open a tenant detail view -> Suspend the tenant -> See the tenant status change
Navigate to /admin/tenants -> Open a tenant detail view -> Activate the tenant -> See the tenant status change
Navigate to /admin/tenants -> Open a tenant detail view -> Change the tenant plan -> See the updated plan

tech_stack.other: Supabase Auth & PostgreSQL, Stripe, M-Pesa Daraja, Zustand, React Hook Form, Zod, react-hot-toast

routes.description: Marketing landing page at root domain
Tenant/admin login with email and password
New tenant registration with business details
Password reset via email link
Tenant POS terminal (redirected from subdomain root)
Tenant dashboard with KPIs, charts, low stock alerts, recent sales
Product inventory management with categories, stock levels, and filters
AI-powered inventory intelligence with demand forecasting and reorder suggestions
Customer management — list, create, edit, view purchase history
Supplier management — list, create, edit contacts
Expense tracking — record and categorize business expenses
Sales history list with filters, receipt viewing, and export
Business reports — sales, revenue, product performance, tax summary
Purchase order management — create, track, and email purchase orders to suppliers
eTIMS KRA compliance dashboard — submit invoices to Kenya Revenue Authority
eTIMS integration settings — device serial, PIN, branch details
Tenant settings — business profile, branding, staff, billing, M-Pesa
Super admin dashboard — platform-wide stats and tenant overview
Tenant list — search, filter, view all tenants
Individual tenant detail — status, plan, billing, activity
Subscription plan management — view and manage pricing tiers
Platform-wide analytics — MRR, churn, active tenants

features.name: M-Pesa STK Push Payment
features.description: Initiate and verify M-Pesa Daraja STK Push payments for sales and subscriptions
user_interactions: Wait for M-Pesa prompt on customer phone
See payment confirmation or failure status

known_limitations.issue: Multi-tenant routing relies on subdomains; local testing requires subdomain DNS setup (e.g. client1.localhost)
known_limitations.impact: Tests running on localhost without subdomain config will hit the marketing page, not the tenant POS

known_limitations.issue: M-Pesa STK Push requires real Safaricom credentials and a registered phone number; sandbox has limited test numbers
known_limitations.impact: M-Pesa payment flows cannot be fully automated without Safaricom sandbox credentials

known_limitations.issue: eTIMS API calls require valid KRA credentials and device serial number
known_limitations.impact: eTIMS submission tests will fail without valid KRA sandbox credentials

known_limitations.issue: Stripe checkout redirects to external Stripe-hosted page
known_limitations.impact: Stripe payment flow tests must use Stripe test mode keys and test card numbers

known_limitations.issue: Inventory Intelligence page may rely on sufficient historical sales data for meaningful AI insights
known_limitations.impact: Empty or sparse databases may show no recommendations
